mapper.select: SELECT s.*, c.name AS customer_name FROM sales s LEFT JOIN customers c ON s.customer_id = c.id ORDER BY s.sale_date DESC, s.id DESC
SELECT s.*, c.name AS customer_name FROM sales s LEFT JOIN customers c ON s.customer_id = c.id WHERE s.id = #{id}
SELECT si.*, eq.name AS quality_name FROM sale_items si LEFT JOIN egg_qualities eq ON si.quality_id = eq.id WHERE si.sale_id = #{saleId}
